title: Command Cockpit Holo Floor
summary: Turned the selected-lane holo board into a lower perspective floor inside the Command Cockpit so the lane reads more like a playable board without adding scroll height.
proof: Scoped the floor treatment to the Command Cockpit so the full holo board remains available in other deck modes.
Reused the existing state-driven level, quest, proof, gate, and trail nodes while lowering, thinning, and perspective-skewing the board.
Added a drifting cockpit floor grid and faster runner motion to make the mounted stage feel active without adding a new section.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the holo-floor unlock.
